case_title: EDDIE RIGGS VS. NOTRE DAME DE NAMUR UNIVERSITY et al

docket_entries.description: CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIGGS, EDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT NOTRE DAME DE NAMUR UNIVERSITY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-22-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-07-2013

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIGGS, EDDIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-22-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-02-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST EDDIE RIGGS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-02-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-22-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2013 CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-20-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST EDDIE RIGGS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-20-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-06-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2013 CONTINUED TO OCT-08-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-08-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST EDDIE RIGGS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-08-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-30-2013. ***NOTE: SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED TO EDDIE RIGGS IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE JUL-02-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AND IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE AUG-20-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ARE ALSO DUE. TOTAL AMOUNT DUE $1200.00.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-08-2013 CONTINUED TO NOV-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S), AND PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AND NO PAYMENT OF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS BY THE NOV-26-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THIS MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-26-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
